name: Robert Townsend
description: Full-stack software engineer with 15+ years experience. Two-time Amazonian. AWS Solutions Architect Professional. Stanford ML Specialization. Specializes in AI-augmented development, multi-agent orchestration, React, and AWS cloud architecture.

Shipped React/TypeScript/Cloudscape UI components to millions of AWS customers
